failedAssertions.reason: No visual sort indicator on initial load — data pre-sorted descending but aria-sort='none' on all columns. Sort cycling is 3-state (none→asc→desc→none) instead of expected 2-state asc/desc toggle. Sorting itself works correctly for data ordering.

AG Grid cellStyle function-based callback ({"function": "..."} format) not executing in dash-ag-grid 33.3.3. Status badges render as plain text without color/icon styling in the table. Sidebar status legend (HTML-based) renders colors correctly.
Same root cause as VAL-TABLE-007: cellStyle function not applying colors to table cells. No color consistency to verify since table cells have no styling at all.

Browser back button does not work because detail view is a same-page overlay (dcc.Store toggle), not a separate URL route. No browser history entry created. In-app '← Back to Leaderboard' button works correctly and preserves all filter state.

Best experiment (exp_lme_0008) row not visually distinguished in leaderboard. The .best-experiment CSS class from rowClassRules is not applied to the DOM row element. The ⭐ star IS shown in detail view header and sidebar 'Best: exp_lme_0008' text, but the table row itself has no highlight.

URL state management broken. Era filter changes and experiment selection do not update the browser URL. dcc.Location(refresh=False) strips query params. The restore_from_url callback works (direct navigation with params restores state) but update_url_state fails to maintain params. Bookmarkability and browser back/forward non-functional.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated experiment counts: LongMemEval is now 93 (dashboard shows), total 451. Previously documented as 78 and 436.
Documented AG Grid interaction frictions: row clicks sometimes toggle selection instead of opening detail; pagination buttons require JS click; sort indicator 3-state cycle.

rootCauseAnalysis.dashAgGridIntegration: Three failures (VAL-TABLE-007, VAL-TABLE-008, VAL-TABLE-019) share a common root cause: dash-ag-grid 33.3.3 does not properly support AG Grid function-based configurations (cellStyle functions, rowClassRules). Only plain object configurations work. This affects status badge colors, sort indicators, and best experiment highlighting. Fix: convert function-based configs to value-based configs computed in Python before passing to the component.
rootCauseAnalysis.urlStateManagement: VAL-TABLE-021 and VAL-TABLE-010 share a related root cause: dcc.Location does not maintain URL query params when refresh=False. The same-page overlay approach for detail view means no browser history entries. Fix: use dcc.Location with refresh=False but pushState via clientside callback, or switch to URL-routed detail view.
